privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to join a Jitsi Meet meeting in the room 'QuarterlyPlanningSync' accessible at http://localhost:8080. The agent must enable screen sharing, capture a screenshot of the active sharing state to /tmp/screen_share_active.png, then stop screen sharing and capture a second screenshot of the normal meeting state to /tmp/screen_share_stopped.png. Jitsi Meet runs locally in Docker containers with no authentication required. All file paths and URLs in the task metadata are accurate and consistently implemented across setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py.
